name: claude-skills-marketplace
description: A curated marketplace of Claude Code plugins for software engineering workflows. Includes engineering-workflow, visual-documentation, productivity, and code-operations plugins with SKILL.md files, agents, scripts, and an MCP-based code execution runtime with sandboxing.
